revision.comment: Bot: mark 1 deleted QID(s) as DELETED_QID in ill templates [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24017044590|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:4 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:4月4日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 4월 4일]][[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:四月初四]][[zh:四月初四]]
{{Not to be confused with|April 4|qq=April 4}} <!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=四月初四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 4월 4일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar April|qq=}} '''April 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|April (Lunisolar)|ja|4月 (旧暦)|lt=April (Uzuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/April (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 4th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839|1=senshū}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}} . == Events == * Year 1 of {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|May 5|en|May 5|qid=Q2550|lt=May 5|1=May 5}} , {{ill|1573|en|1573|qid=Q6678|lt=1573|1=1573}} ) – {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|qid=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga|1=Oda Nobunaga}} surrounds the {{ill|Nijō Palace|ja|二条御所|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nijō Palace|1=Nijō Palace|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q129949871}} , where {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|ja|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Yoshiaki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , the {{ill|Shogun|en|Shogun|qid=Q131767|lt=Seii Taishogun|1=Shogun}} , resides. A truce is mediated by imperial order on May 7. * Year 1 of {{ill|Yuanhe|en|Yuanhe|qid=Q10889567|lt=Genna (Japan)|1=Yuanhe}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|May 1|en|May 1|qid=Q2544|lt=May 1|1=May 1}} , {{ill|1615|en|1615|qid=Q6784|lt=1615|1=1615}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|qid=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu}} orders the second siege of Osaka, initiating the {{ill|Siege of Osaka#Summer Campaign|ja|大坂夏の陣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Siege of Osaka#Summer Campaign|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大坂の陣|1=Siege of Osaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q475780}} . * Year 4 of {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|May 22|en|May 22|qid=Q2581|lt=May 22|1=May 22}} , {{ill|1871|en|1871|qid=Q7746|lt=1871|1=1871}} ) – The {{ill|Family law in Japan|en|Family law in Japan|qid=Q11496597|lt=Koseki law|1=Family law in Japan}} is promulgated. == Births == * Year 14 of {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|May 7|en|May 7|qid=Q2553|lt=May 7|1=May 7}} , {{ill|1609|en|1609|qid=Q6762|lt=1609|1=1609}} ) – {{ill|Ikeda Mitsumasa|en|Ikeda Mitsumasa|qid=Q3148401|lt=Ikeda Mitsumasa|1=Ikeda Mitsumasa}} , lord of {{ill|Okayama Domain|1=Okayama Domain|2=ja|3=岡山藩|ja|Okayama Domain|1=Okayama Domain|2=ja|3=岡山藩|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okayama Domain|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q903497}} (d. {{ill|1682|en|1682|qid=Q7648|lt=1682|1=1682}} ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Kanbun (era)|en|Kanbun (era)|qid=Q1146228|lt=Kanbun (Japan)|1=Kanbun (era)}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|May 2|en|May 2|qid=Q2545|lt=May 2|1=May 2}} , {{ill|1661|en|1661|qid=Q7005|lt=1661|1=1661}} ) – {{ill|Uejima Onitsura|en|Uejima Onitsura|qid=Q240176|lt=Uejima Onitsura|1=Uejima Onitsura}} , {{ill|Haiku|ja|Haiku Poet|1=Q135490197|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|1=Haiku Poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|qid=DELETED_QID|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Haiku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} poet (d. {{ill|1738|en|1738|qid=Q6996|lt=1738|1=1738}} ). * Year 3 of {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|May 7|en|May 7|qid=Q2553|lt=May 7|1=May 7}} , {{ill|1867|en|1867|qid=Q7715|lt=1867|1=1867}} ) – {{ill|Ichiki Kitokurō|en|Ichiki Kitokurō|qid=Q856388|lt=Ichiki Kitokurō|1=Ichiki Kitokurō}} , government official and politician (d. {{ill|1944|en|1944|qid=Q5268|lt=1944|1=1944}} ). * Year 2 of {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|May 15|en|May 15|qid=Q2562|lt=May 15|1=May 15}} , {{ill|1869|en|1869|qid=Q7720|lt=1869|1=1869}} ) – {{ill|Matsuse Seisetsu|ja|松瀬青々|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsuse Seisetsu|1=Seisei Matsuse|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11531936}} , haiku poet (d. {{ill|1937|en|1937|qid=Q18647|lt=1937|1=1937}} ). * Year 3 of {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|May 4|en|May 4|qid=Q2549|lt=May 4|1=May 4}} , {{ill|1870|en|1870|qid=Q7741|lt=1870|1=1870}} ) – {{ill|Torii Ryūzō|en|Torii Ryūzō|qid=Q707532|lt=Torii Ryūzō|1=Torii Ryūzō}} , archaeologist (d. {{ill|1953|en|1953|qid=Q18585|lt=1953|1=1953}} ). == Deaths == * Year 4 of {{ill|Emperor Monmu|en|Emperor Monmu|qid=Q357246|lt=Bunmu|1=Emperor Monmu}} (Julian calendar {{ill|April 27|en|April 27|qid=Q2533|lt=April 27|1=April 27}} , {{ill|700|en|700|qid=Q23494|lt=700|1=700}} ) – {{ill|Princess Asuka|en|Princess Asuka|qid=Q3275328|lt=Asuka no Ōjo|1=Princess Asuka}} , imperial princess. * Year 9 of {{ill|Engi (era)|en|Engi (era)|qid=Q1374325|lt=Engi|1=Engi (era)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|April 26|en|April 26|qid=Q2532|lt=April 26|1=April 26}} , {{ill|909|en|909|qid=Q24775|lt=909|1=909}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Tokihira|en|Fujiwara no Tokihira|qid=Q2994735|lt=Fujiwara no Tokihira|1=Fujiwara no Tokihira}} , court noble and son of {{ill|Fujiwara no Mototsune|en|Fujiwara no Mototsune|qid=Q1397196|lt=Fujiwara no Mototsune|1=Fujiwara no Mototsune}} (b. {{ill|871|en|871|qid=Q24754|lt=871|1=871}} ). * Year 7 of {{ill|Kōan (Kamakura period)|en|Kōan (Kamakura period)|qid=Q389180|lt=Kōan (Japan)|1=Kōan (Kamakura period)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|April 20|en|April 20|qid=Q2524|lt=April 20|1=April 20}} , {{ill|1284|en|1284|qid=Q5544|lt=1284|1=1284}} ) – {{ill|Hōjō Tokimune|en|Hōjō Tokimune|qid=Q430964|lt=Hōjō Tokimune|1=Hōjō Tokimune}} , 8th regent of the {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|en|Kamakura shogunate|qid=Q736839|lt=Kamakura shogunate|1=Kamakura shogunate}} (b. {{ill|1251|en|1251|qid=Q5494|lt=1251|1=1251}} ). == Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|4|3|4|5|3|4|5|4|0404|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
